title: 30m Washing Line Rope, Heavy Duty Clothes Line Steel Core, Strong String 4mm Dia Clotheslines, Long Clothes Lines for Outside Garden Travel, Rustproof and Waterproof Washing Lines, 120kg LC
features: 【4mm Diameter & 30m Length】Fentar clothes line for outside is 4mm in diameter, stronger than most of other brands. Designed in 30m/100ft long, meets high demands for length, you can cut off to whatever length you want. Note: We suggest to use pliers or wire cutters for cutting off.

【Heave Duty Washing Line】Made from strong steel core, our washing line is super strong and heavy duty that can hold up to 120kg. Thus you can rest assured to hang heavy wet duvets or clothes on this washing line without worrying about the clothes line breaking!
【Long Lasting】This clothes line is covered in strength PVC material, which makes it aging resistant, waterproof, rust proof, not easy to break and long lasting. Ready for all seasons of weather.
【Easy to Install】 Just tie clothes line onto trees in your garden, balconies, washing line post, washing line pole or fence posts.

【Wide Application】 Our steel core washing line are not only suitable for clothes and thick linen, but can also be used for gardening wire cables, string lights hanging cables and agricultural support cables.
description: Specification: Material: Steel core + PVC Material Color: Beige Weight：585 g Size： Length: 30 meters Diameter: 4mm Package Include: 1 pack 30 meters clothes line Features: 1. This 30M long washing line is made of a strong and durable high-quality steel core for a long service life, thus you do not need to replace it frequently. 2. The PVC Materials outer layer helps the clothes line stay clean and protect it from dirt, contamination, rot, and the weather. Thick PVC coating allows the washing line to be used outdoors no matter sunny, rainy or windy. 3. Washing line is perfect for gardens, outdoors, living rooms, balconies, courtyards and other places to dry clothes or quilt. 4. Easy to use. Just tie clothes line onto trees in your garden, balconies, washing line post, washing line pole or fence posts.
